name: Editorial Collage
description: Vintage editorial collage / documentary poster / scrapbook journalism style with aged paper background, hand-drawn grid, and blue brush strokes.
prompt_template: 9:16 portrait canvas 1080x1920px, editorial collage documentary style, aged cream parchment background (#e8e4dc), full-canvas subtle hand-drawn pencil graph grid overlay at 45% opacity, centered rectangular black and white high-contrast grainy historical photograph of {subject}, three loose wide flat paintbrush swipes in muted steel blue (#8bafc4) at 75% opacity layered behind and in front of photo edges, {text_section}vintage analog mixed-media aesthetic, scrapbook journalism, matte finish, no digital gradients, film grain texture on photo
text_section_template: handwritten typewriter-style centered text below photo reading '{text_overlay}' in dark brown-black (#2a2520) with hand-drawn wavy underline,

dimensions.format_use_case: mobile screen, Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts

image_style.overall_style: editorial collage / documentary poster / scrapbook journalism
image_style.aesthetic: vintage editorial, analog mixed-media, historical documentary
image_style.technique: layered mixed-media — photograph + hand-drawn grid + paint brush strokes + handwritten typography

background.texture: aged paper / parchment — slightly uneven, warm cream

grid_overlay.type: hand-drawn thin pencil grid / graph paper lines
grid_overlay.style: slightly imperfect, not perfectly straight — hand-ruled feel

main_photo.contrast: high contrast — deep blacks, bright whites
main_photo.grain: heavy film grain / analog noise overlay
main_photo.shape: rectangular with hard edges — no border radius
main_photo.subject: {{SUBJECT_DESCRIPTION}}

brush_strokes.style: wide flat paintbrush swipe — gestural, loose, imperfect

placement.position: right side overlapping photo right edge, vertically oriented

brush_strokes.layer_order: some strokes behind photo, some in front — layered depth

typography.font_feel: hand-lettered monospace — like typed on vintage typewriter then slightly hand-adjusted
typography.underline: single hand-drawn underline beneath full text block

layer_stack_bottom_to_top: 2. Hand-drawn pencil grid overlay (full canvas, 40% opacity)
6. Blue brush stroke — right side (on top of photo)
image_style.mood: historical, documentary, editorial gravitas, analog warmth, journalistic authenticity
